lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You look like a farmer. Don't see many farmers around here.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Aye, that you don't. I'm from Hosidius, y'see. I just come here to drink.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You travel all the way out to Shayzien just for a few beers? Don't you have a pub back home?

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Indeed we do... But I can't stand the place for more than a few minutes.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: Have you ever been in there? Such a rowdy crowd... people shouting across the bar about 'Farming this', 'Farming that'... can barely hear myself think half the time.

lines.speaker: Farmer
lines.text: No, no... Can't be doin' with it. That's why I make the trip out here for a nice quiet one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'd better leave you to it then!
